log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Merfolk — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Merfolk — Bardic Musician (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Merfolk — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:12+9=21 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Finger of Death on Merfolk — Bardic Musician. 7d8+30 necrotic.

→ Merfolk — Bardic Musician: CON save [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 20] FAIL! 35 necrotic damage. HP: 32/67
